name: Buttered Popcorn Bread
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Popped popcorn, cooled and salted
Popped using a popcorn machine or stovetop method
Salt the popcorn and allow to cool completely
Crush into fine pieces by hand or in a food processor until reduced to about 2 1/2 cups
1 tablespoon Popcorn oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bread machine.
2. Press START to begin mixing and kneading the dough.
3. Once the machine has finished mixing, the dough will be ready for baking.
